{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20871_1
|class_id=20871
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20871_2
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=28
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>prop@58571_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>prop@58571_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58571_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58571_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58571_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600<br> (Awakened)
}}
